2021-22 Montana State Bobcats Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 27-8 (16-4, 1st in Big Sky MBB)

Coach: Danny Sprinkle

PS/G: 76.5 (46th of 358)

PA/G: 69.3 (186th of 358)

SRS: -0.26 (158th of 358)

SOS: -5.54 (295th of 358)

ORtg: 108.9 (46th of 358)

DRtg: 98.6 (127th of 358)

Preseason Odds: Championship +100000

NCAA Tournament: (#14 seed in West)
Lost West First Round (97-62) versus #3 Texas Tech

  • Big Sky Reg Season Champ
  • Big Sky Tourney Champ
